items.title: Zimbabwean football star survives gun attack in South Africa
items.dek: South African police say they are investigating a case of attempted murder but that no arrests have been made so far.
items.body: South African police say they are investigating a case of attempted murder but that no arrests have been made so far.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Explosions injure 18 in Damascus during Macron's visit
items.dek: As reports of the blasts came in, state television said the Syrian president had welcomed Macron at the presidential palace.
items.body: As reports of the blasts came in, state television said the Syrian president had welcomed Macron at the presidential palace.
items.author: IriLine Desk
